Species —
Quick assessment notes (app will suggest scores based on what you write)
Species creation sheet
Every answer should explain how this trait helps your species survive in your chosen biome. Scientifically justified and biome-compatible adaptations will be rewarded. Unrealistic or vague responses may lose marks.
Team name
Species name
Scientific-sounding names encouraged.
Elemental affinity
Electricity → bioelectric organs  |  Acid → corrosive compounds  |  Ice → antifreeze proteins
Habitat zone
Movement type
e.g. climbing, gliding, burrowing, sprinting, endurance walking
Feeding strategy
e.g. predator, scavenger, fungi feeder, omnivore, chemosynthetic
Defense mechanism
e.g. camouflage, armour, toxin resistance, speed, intimidation
Sensory adaptations
e.g. echolocation, thermal sensing, smell tracking, vibration sensing, night vision
Reproductive strategy
e.g. many offspring, seasonal reproduction, few protected offspring, pack raising
Major strength
Major weakness
Every species must have a biological limitation or trade-off.
e.g. high energy requirement, poor endurance, vulnerable to heat, low mobility
Evolutionary justification
Why would evolution favour these adaptations in your biome?
